info.title: BiggerHat API
info.description: Public API for the BiggerHat Malifaux database.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of abilities, optionally filtered by name.

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

get.description: Returns a single ability by its ID.
Returns a paginated list of actions, optionally filtered by name or type.

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

get.description: Returns a single action with its associated triggers.
Returns a paginated list of blueprints, optionally filtered by name or image availability.

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

get.description: Returns a single blueprint with its associated characters, miniatures, and packages.
Returns a paginated list of channels with their transmission counts, optionally filtered by name.

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

get.description: Returns a single channel with its transmissions (including their characters and keywords) and transmission count.
Returns a paginated list of characteristics (e.g. Versatile, Ruthless).

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

get.description: Returns a characteristic by its slug.
Returns a paginated list of visible characters with their miniatures, keywords, characteristics, and totem.

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

get.description: Returns a character with all related data including miniatures, keywords, characteristics, totem, actions, triggers, abilities, markers, tokens, and character upgrades.

get.summary: View a public crew build by share code

get.description: Returns all factions with their value, label, color, and logo.
Returns a faction with its value, label, color, logo, and character statistics.
Returns a paginated list of keywords, optionally filtered by name.

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

get.description: Returns a single keyword with its associated visible characters.

Returns a paginated list of Malifaux lore entries (novellas, fiction, articles) and the
characters/media associated with them.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

Returns a paginated list of source media (novellas, articles, etc) that lore entries belong to.

get.description: Returns a single strategy by its ID.

Returns a paginated list of TOS abilities. General abilities are shared across allegiances;
non-general abilities are tied to a specific Allegiance.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

get.description: Returns a single allegiance card with its parent allegiance and abilities.
get.summary: Get a single TOS Allegiance Card

get.description: Returns a paginated list of The Other Side allegiances (Earth/Malifaux factions and syndicates).

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

get.description: Returns a single allegiance by its slug.
Returns a paginated list of company-level Assets (vehicles, gear, mounts, etc).

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

get.description: Returns a single asset with allegiances, abilities, actions (with triggers), and attachment limits.

Returns a paginated list of public Company army lists (the TOS analog of
Malifaux crew builds), newest first.

Returns the full roster — units (with attached Assets), the Commander, and
the Scrip budget/spent/remaining (rulebook p. 9).
get.summary: View a public TOS Company by share code

get.description:
Returns a paginated list of public Garrisons — the tournament pool a
player declares before an event — newest first.

Returns the declared pool — units, the Asset pool (with quantities),
Stratagems, Envoys, the format budget, and whether it's currently legal.
get.summary: View a public TOS Garrison by share code

get.description: Returns Special Unit Rules (Commander, Titan, Fireteam, Squad, Champion, Reserves, Combined Arms, etc).
get.summary: List all TOS Special Unit Rules

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of Stratagems. Filterable by Allegiance or Allegiance Type.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

get.description: Returns a single stratagem with its parent allegiance (if any).

Returns a paginated list of Triggers. Triggers are shared across multiple Actions
via the `tos_action_trigger` pivot.

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

get.description:
Returns a paginated list of units with sides, sculpts, allegiances, and special unit rules.
Combined Arms child units are excluded by default; pass `include_combined_arms_children=1` to include them.

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

get.description: Returns a single unit looked up by the Unit's own slug (Unit::getRouteKeyName) with full related data. The public web view uses sculpt slugs so users land on a specific art variant; the API exposes the canonical unit slug since responses already include every sculpt.
Returns a paginated list of terrains, optionally filtered by name.

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

Returns a paginated list of transmissions with their channel, characters, and keywords. Sorted by release date (newest first).

get.description: Returns a single transmission with its associated channel, characters, and keywords.
Returns a paginated list of triggers, optionally filtered by name.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

get.description: Returns a single trigger with its associated actions.

Returns a paginated list of upgrades, optionally filtered by domain, faction, type, or name.
When searching crew upgrades (`domain=crew`), the search term is also matched against linked
character names (display_name and nicknames) so you can find a crew upgrade by its master.

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

get.description: Returns a single upgrade with its associated keywords, actions, triggers, abilities, markers, tokens, and characters.
